case_title: THIBAUT, JEAN CLAUDE VS LOPEZ, JASON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY THIBAUT, JEAN CLAUDE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JASON LOPEZ, JASON A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
UNTIMELY SERVICE; DEFT JASON A. LOPEZ WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 25 DAYS NOTICE FROM THE MAILING DATE.
DEFEND. REQUESTED A CONT. TO 3-7-97 @ 8:30 AM SENT TO COURT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-05-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-07-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO ADVANCE DATE DENIED. COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION CONTINUES HEARING TO 5/7/97 AT 1:30PM.
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO 5/7/97 QUASHED. RESCHEDULE TO ORIGINAL DATE.OF 3/7/97 AT 8:30AM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIBAUT, JEAN CLAUDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JASON LOPEZ, JASON A. $577.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $592.00, JUDGMENT REFLECTS PRINCIPAL RENTAL OF $1000 REDUCE BY $423. AS CREDIT FOR DEFT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $24.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JASON
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JASON
